data.name: Sex Office
data.detailed_description:
In Sex Office you will be able to make your sexual fantasies come true and have sex with all your coworkers in the office.

You will start working as a technology director and your goal is to become the executive director of the company through meetings, complete tasks and spend part of the money to improve the offices and hire more workers.

The more power you have within the company the more girls will agree to sleep with you. Power and money is everything in life and your goal is to get it all.

There are a total of 7 girls with whom you can interact and have dates, with each girl you can enjoy 2 unique sex scenes of great quality.

Become a millionaire by completing the tasks (Missions) that you can accept by talking to the office receptionist. Show your negotiating skills and get the best deals for your business. You can also take a risk and invest in stocks to try to increase your fortune or lose it all.

Meet with investors and show them how qualified you are to run the business. Climb the ranks within the company and conquer the world.

data.short_description: In Sex Office you will be able to make your sexual fantasies come true and have sex with all your colleagues at work in the office. There are a total of 7 girls with whom you can interact and date, with each girl you can enjoy unique high quality sex scenes.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 義大利文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 日文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i5 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11
  • 處理器: i7 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GeForce GTX 3060 | AMD Radeon HD 6870 or greater
  • 儲存空間: 7 GB 可用空間
